objective: One-shot prospective evaluation of a frozen contact-family sequence surrogate against continuous independent 8X6B/9E6Y Docking geometry in the protocol-defined V4-H QC-qualified new-parent design universe.
claim_boundary: This protocol evaluates computational independent-dual-receptor Docking geometry only. It is not PVRIG binding probability, affinity or Kd, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission authority.

estimand.name: V4_H_QC_QUALIFIED_NEW_PARENT_DESIGN_UNIVERSE
estimand.target_population: PVRIG-conditioned VHH designs generated from the frozen V4-H new-parent queue under the frozen H0-H3 generator and QC protocol that pass the frozen Full-QC hard gate.
estimand.evaluation_sample: The immutable 96-row H4 panel selected without model or Docking information from the first four queue-ordered QC_CAPACITY_READY parent clusters, balanced as four candidates from each of six patch-by-mode strata per parent.
estimand.quantity: Prospective ranking and calibration performance of the frozen contact-family surrogate for continuous R_dual_min within the protocol-defined QC-qualified new-parent design universe.
conditioning: new parent framework clusters excluded from V4-D, V4-F, V4-G, reserve2, and calibration exact-sequence use
frozen sequence and developability Full-QC hard pass
frozen H4 queue, capacity, stratum-balance, and candidate-hash selection
no replacement after the H4 panel is frozen
not_identified_for: natural VHH databases or ungenerated sequence space
PVRIG binding, affinity, competition, or experimental blocking
experimental success or final submission ranking

lineage_and_nonrevision.inheritance_rule: Reuse the V4-F V2 endpoint, metric definitions, thresholds, denominator gates, bootstrap contract, uncertainty diagnostics, and technical-failure handling without scientific relaxation.
allowed_version_changes: rename result statuses from V4-F96 to V4-H-QC96
bind a future immutable V4-H H4 manifest, prediction receipt, eligibility receipt, Docking-label receipt, evaluator implementation freeze, and runtime trust anchor
state the V4-H QC-qualified new-parent estimand
forbidden: modify or supersede V4-F V2 evidence
lower a scientific threshold or denominator minimum
select a model, weight, threshold, parent, candidate, or replacement using V4-H Docking results
reuse this version after a scientific FAIL or consumed one-shot unseal

future_panel_contract.parent_selection: Take the first four QC_CAPACITY_READY parents in the H0-frozen 12-parent queue; readiness requires at least 24 Full-QC hard-pass candidates and at least four Full-QC hard-pass candidates in every frozen stratum.
future_panel_contract.candidate_selection: Within each selected parent and stratum, take the first four Full-QC hard-pass candidates by the H0-frozen candidate hash ordering.
future_panel_contract.replacement_policy: No replacement, score-based substitution, parent substitution, or candidate substitution after the H4 panel receipt is frozen.

future_prediction_freeze_contract.required_order: Freeze and hash-close the H4 manifest, surrogate model/configuration, 96-row predictions, prediction audit, and prediction receipt before any V4-H Docking-label path is accepted or opened.
future_prediction_freeze_contract.primary_model_selection: use the contact-stage selected_candidate_model frozen on OPEN_DEVELOPMENT; no post-Docking family switching or ensemble reweighting
future_prediction_freeze_contract.multiplicity_policy: single preregistered contact-family primary test; base and embedding families are descriptive secondary analyses only
future_prediction_freeze_contract.tie_break: candidate_id ascending after exact score and uncertainty ties
future_prediction_freeze_contract.full_qc_attrition: report all Full-QC failures; evaluate the primary endpoint only for the frozen policy-defined Docking set without replacement or score-based substitution
forbidden_after_unseal: tune weights or thresholds on V4-H Docking labels

future_dual_docking_label_contract.technical_failure_policy: Keep in the Full-QC hard-pass denominator, require blank R_dual_min plus a nonempty reason, never impute, and exclude only from calculable metrics.
future_dual_docking_label_contract.required_terminal_job_closure: All preregistered candidate-by-receptor-by-seed jobs must be terminal before a label release receipt can be created.

scientific_evaluation_contract.primary_overall_metric: Spearman rank correlation between contact_predicted_geometry_score and R_dual_min across analyzable Full-QC hard-pass candidates.

frozen_decision_thresholds.applicability: Applied once only after all minimum-denominator gates pass.
frozen_decision_thresholds.pass: PASS_V4_H_QC96_COMPUTATIONAL_GEOMETRY_SURROGATE only if all applicable mandatory gates pass.
frozen_decision_thresholds.fail: FAIL_V4_H_QC96_COMPUTATIONAL_GEOMETRY_SURROGATE if denominator is sufficient and any applicable mandatory gate fails.
frozen_decision_thresholds.insufficient: INSUFFICIENT_TECHNICAL_COVERAGE if any frozen denominator, parent coverage, seed completeness, or bootstrap-validity minimum is not met.

bootstrap.invalid_replicates: omit undefined Spearman replicates and report valid fraction

metric_definitions.enrichment_factor_at_top10pct: Truth positives are observed top ceil(0.25*N) R_dual_min candidates; select top ceil(0.10*N) by frozen contact score; EF10=(hits/top10_budget)/(truth_positive_count/N). Candidate_id ascending resolves exact ties. Random-ranking expectation is 1.0.
metric_definitions.mae: Mean absolute error of contact score versus R_dual_min.
metric_definitions.ndcg: linear nonnegative R_dual_min gain with log2 discount, evaluated over all analyzable rows.
metric_definitions.parent_macro: Unweighted mean across defined per-parent metrics; no row-count weighting.
metric_definitions.per_parent: All metrics repeated within parent_framework_cluster when defined.
metric_definitions.primary_overall: Spearman rank correlation between contact_predicted_geometry_score and R_dual_min across analyzable Full-QC hard-pass candidates.
metric_definitions.shortcut_policy: If and only if the frozen prediction table carries a selected model whose name is one of the predeclared shortcut names, compare contact to the strongest such frozen shortcut without selecting or tuning after labels.
metric_definitions.spearman_ties: average ranks; undefined when either vector is constant
metric_definitions.top_quartile_recall_at_exact_20pct_budge: Observed top ceil(0.25*N) by R_dual_min; predicted budget top ceil(0.20*N) by contact score; candidate_id ascending resolves exact ties; report the realized integer budget fraction.
metric_definitions.uncertainty_selective_risk: Remove the ceil(25%*N) highest contact-uncertainty rows and compare retained MAE with overall MAE; also compare highest versus lowest uncertainty quartile MAE.

contract_equivalence_anchors.equivalence_note: Automated tests compare every inherited scientific metric, numeric threshold, denominator minimum, bootstrap rule, prediction-policy field, endpoint, seed, and technical-failure rule against the hash-frozen V4-F V2 preregistration. V4-H-specific result names and artifact schemas are identity/version changes only.

one_shot_and_failure_policy.lock_creation_timing: Only the future independently frozen evaluator may atomically create the V4-H one-shot lock immediately before label unseal, after prediction and eligibility gates pass.
after_unseal_forbidden: change weights, endpoint, thresholds, denominator, bootstrap seed, budget rounding, or missingness handling
select an alternate model from V4-H labels
rerun under the same version after a scientific FAIL
one_shot_and_failure_policy.output_publication: Stage outputs then atomically publish the formal receipt last; refuse a nonempty output directory or any previously consumed one-shot lock.

forbidden_current_artifacts: V4-H runtime trust anchor or implementation freeze
V4-H formal evaluation output or receipt
V4-H Docking-label receipt or label table
